'''lobashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:juddery|juddery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:juddery|juddery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lobashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobashithi|lobashithi]] || [[word:lobashiji|lobashiji]] || [[word:lobashishi|lobashishi]] || [[word:lobashiki|lobashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobashuthuthu|lobashuthuthu]] || [[word:lobashujuju|lobashujuju]] || [[word:lobashushushu|lobashushushu]] || [[word:lobashukuku|lobashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobashuthu|lobashuthu]] || [[word:lobashuju|lobashuju]] || [[word:lobashushu|lobashushu]] || [[word:lobashuku|lobashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobashufthuf|lobashufthuf]] || [[word:lobashufjuf|lobashufjuf]] || [[word:lobashufshuf|lobashufshuf]] || [[word:lobashufkuf|lobashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobashethe|lobashethe]] || [[word:lobasheje|lobasheje]] || [[word:lobasheshe|lobasheshe]] || [[word:lobasheke|lobasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobashothotho|lobashothotho]] || [[word:lobashojojo|lobashojojo]] || [[word:lobashoshosho|lobashoshosho]] || [[word:lobashokoko|lobashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobashotho|lobashotho]] || [[word:lobashojo|lobashojo]] || [[word:lobashosho|lobashosho]] || [[word:lobashoko|lobashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobashofthof|lobashofthof]] || [[word:lobashofjof|lobashofjof]] || [[word:lobashofshof|lobashofshof]] || [[word:lobashofkof|lobashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfthĂŻf|lobashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfjĂŻf|lobashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfshĂŻf|lobashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfkĂŻf|lobashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lobashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lobashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lobashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lobashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfthĂŻf|lobashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfjĂŻf|lobashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfshĂŻf|lobashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfkĂŻf|lobashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfthĂŻf|lobashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfjĂŻf|lobashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfshĂŻf|lobashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lobashĂŻfkĂŻf|lobashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobashĂŠthĂŠ|lobashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lobashĂŠjĂŠ|lobashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lobashĂŠshĂŠ|lobashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lobashĂŠkĂŠ|lobashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobashathatha|lobashathatha]] || [[word:lobashajaja|lobashajaja]] || [[word:lobashashasha|lobashashasha]] || [[word:lobashakaka|lobashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobashatha|lobashatha]] || [[word:lobashaja|lobashaja]] || [[word:lobashasha|lobashasha]] || [[word:lobashaka|lobashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobashafthaf|lobashafthaf]] || [[word:lobashafjaf|lobashafjaf]] || [[word:lobashafshaf|lobashafshaf]] || [[word:lobashafkaf|lobashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lobashasha|lobashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lobashĂ«sha|lobashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lobashrosha|lobashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lobashmusha|lobashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lobashyasha|lobashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golobashnkshĂ«sha|golobashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golobashnkrosha|golobashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golobashnkmusha|golobashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golobashnkyasha|golobashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lobabashasha|lobabashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lobabashĂ«sha|lobabashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lobabashrosha|lobabashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lobabashmusha|lobabashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lobabashyasha|lobabashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golobabashnkshĂ«sha|golobabashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golobabashnkrosha|golobabashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golobabashnkmusha|golobabashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golobabashnkyasha|golobabashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lebĂŠshasha|lebĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lebĂŠshĂ«sha|lebĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lebĂŠshrosha|lebĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lebĂŠshmusha|lebĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lebĂŠshyasha|lebĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golebĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|golebĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golebĂŠshnkrosha|golebĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golebĂŠshnkmusha|golebĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golebĂŠshnkyasha|golebĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lobfashasha|lobfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lobfashĂ«sha|lobfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lobfashrosha|lobfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lobfashmusha|lobfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lobfashyasha|lobfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golobfashnkshĂ«sha|golobfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golobfashnkrosha|golobfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golobfashnkmusha|golobfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golobfashnkyasha|golobfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
